Contradicted by the task.json prompt ("auto body spray painter") and the GNU Health Demo database SQL dump ("Architect"). The metadata seems to mistakenly describe a generic agent role.

Contradicted by the task.json prompt (auto body repair) and the GNU Health Demo database SQL dump (NULL industry). The metadata describes the clinical specialty domain instead of the patient's industry.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated demo data within the GNU Health database. Verified that the target patient is John Zenon. The required diagnostic ICD-10 code is J45 (Asthma), and the acceptable bronchodilators include Salbutamol, Albuterol, Budesonide, Fluticasone, or Beclometasone. The clinical evaluation requires a Respiratory Rate of 24 (verifier checks >= 22) and an Oxygen Saturation of 93% (verifier checks <= 94%). At least 2 baseline lab orders must be requested, and the follow-up appointment must be scheduled 14 to 30 days from the task start. The metadata claims for occupation and industry contradict both the prompt description and the underlying database.
